decisions.decision: Reverted original Plan 01+02 implementations (10 commits) and replanned against HermesApp
decisions.rationale: Both plans targeted warp_hermes.rs which is legacy-shell dead code (default features mount HermesApp). SSR panicked with 'Could not find context Signal<bool>'

decisions.decision: Track Cargo.lock at workspace root + pin dioxus = "=0.7.1" in iron_hermes_ui/Cargo.toml
decisions.rationale: Cargo.lock was gitignored; fresh worktrees re-resolved dioxus=0.7 to latest 0.7.9, breaking dx CLI compatibility

decisions.decision: Path A for progress_callback (slot + RAII guard on AppState)
decisions.rationale: AppRuntimeBundle.progress_callback is baked into a singleton Arc at AppState::init(); cannot replace per-turn

decisions.decision: Use use_resource instead of use_server_future for ScreenAgents
decisions.rationale: use_server_future(...)? early-returns on suspended state, killing subsequent hook registrations (poll loop never ran after restart)

decisions.decision: use web_time::Instant everywhere instead of std::time::Instant
decisions.rationale: std::time::Instant panics on wasm32 with 'time not implemented'

context_notes: Phase 26.7.1 went through extensive iteration. Wave 1 hit 4 UAT cycles (kill/interrupt HOLD bug, baseline-polling regression, infinite render loop, Instant::now wasm32 panic) before passing. Each fix surfaced the next failing line. Wave 2 implementation looks clean on paper (build/test gates all green, Arc::new not Box::new verified, JSON shape test passes). UAT focus is the headline live-spawn <1s behavior. Worktree is still alive — agent ID aac7b73dafc0ba46f addressable via SendMessage.
